body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent` **Service directory:** `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/` **Triggered by:** commit 3e09cc59bf9d20ccf2be4279b768de0f7479323a (PR #57631) by @radhgupta ## What Changed PR #57631 migrated `Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent` to the new TypeSpec emitter. The migration entailed: - **Complete regeneration** of all files under `src/Generated/` (dozens of files removed and re-added under the new emitter output) - **New backward-compatibility shims** added under `src/Custom/BackwardCompat/`: - `AbstractTypeConstructors.cs` — constructors for abstract types - `ClientMethodShims.cs` — overloads accepting `IReadOnlyDictionary` metadata (old signature) delegating to the new `IDictionary` signatures on `PersistentAgentsAdministrationClient`, `ThreadMessages`, `ThreadRuns`, `Threads`, and `VectorStores` - `MissingTypes.cs` — types present in old generated output but missing from new generator output - `ModelFactoryShims.cs` — shims for `PersistentAgentsModelFactory` factory methods - `PropertyShims.cs` — property-level backward compat shims - **Renamed client builder extension**: `AIAgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions` → `AgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions` - **New generated model factory**: `AgentsPersistentModelFactory` (2372 lines added) - **API surface change**: ~970 additions and ~145 deletions in the public API listing files ## Gaps Found - The `CHANGELOG.md` unreleased section `## 1.2.0-beta.11 (Unreleased)` is completely empty — all four subsections (`Features Added`, `Breaking Changes`, `Bugs Fixed`, `Other Changes`) are blank despite significant changes - The metadata parameter type change (`IReadOnlyDictionary` → `IDictionary`) is a **breaking change** that is not documented - The renamed `AgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions` (formerly `AIAgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions`) is not mentioned in the changelog - The new `AgentsPersistentModelFactory` type is not documented in the changelog - The new `BackwardCompat` shims that preserve compatibility for callers using the old `IReadOnlyDictionary` metadata parameter type are not mentioned
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above ### Step 1: Modify files **File:** `sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/CHANGELOG.md` Edit the `## 1.2.0-beta.11 (Unreleased)` section to add entries for all changes introduced in the emitter migration. Suggested content: ```markdown ## 1.2.0-beta.11 (Unreleased) ### Features Added - Added `AgentsPersistentModelFactory` as the new centralized model factory for test and mock support. ### Breaking Changes - Metadata parameters across `PersistentAgentsAdministrationClient`, `ThreadMessages`, `ThreadRuns`, `Threads`, and `VectorStores` changed from `IReadOnlyDictionary` to `IDictionary`. Backward-compatible overloads accepting `IReadOnlyDictionary` are provided as `[EditorBrowsable(EditorBrowsableState.Never)]` shims for existing callers. - `AIAgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions` was renamed to `AgentsPersistentClientBuilderExtensions`. ### Other Changes - Migrated package code generation to the new TypeSpec HTTP client C# emitter. No functional behavior change is expected for most users. ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets No new snippets are required for this change; the CHANGELOG update is pure documentation. ### Step 3: Verify README structure The README already contains all required sections. No structural changes are needed. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order: 1. `dotnet build sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 ai` — confirm no unexpected README diffs 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 ai` — confirm the public API listing is consistent 5. `dotnet format sdk/ai/Azure.AI.Agents.Persistent/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
title: [Azure AI Agents Persistent] Docs: CHANGELOG missing entries for TypeSpec emitter migration in 1.2.0-beta.11
